command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.202 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== Add send_message to tools deny list in config.yaml ==="
# The tools: section exists at line 455. We need to add deny: [send_message] under it
# Current structure:
#   tools:
#     tool_search:
#       ...
# We add BEFORE tool_search:
#   tools:
#     deny:
#       - send_message
#     tool_search:

cp /home/jose/.hermes/config.yaml /home/jose/.hermes/config.yaml.bak-nodeny-$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)

# Insert deny block right after "tools:" line
sed -i '/^tools:/{n; s/^  tool_search:/  deny:\n    - send_message\n  tool_search:/}' /home/jose/.hermes/config.yaml

echo "Verifying insertion:"
grep -A6 "^tools:" /home/jose/.hermes/config.yaml

echo ""
echo "=== Restart Sakura to apply ==="
sudo systemctl restart hermes-gateway
sleep 12
echo "active: $(systemctl is-active hermes-gateway)"

echo ""
echo "=== Confirm send_message denied in startup log ==="
tail -10 /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log
REMOTE
